description: Account of expenditures ca. 1200. Various expenditures, mostly on repairs, are recorded by a parnas, R. Yeshu'a. Written on both sides of a leaf, of which the verso contains the behinning of a letter, not pertaining to this topic. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 394 #106)
description_he: חשבון הוצאות כ-1200. הוצאות שונות, בעיקר תיקונים, הנרשמות בידי הפרנס ר' ישועה.
